Video.summary: Monster Jam heads across the border to the streets of Montreal, Canada, at Olympic Stadium for the first time in almost a decade.
Video.title: Olympic Stadium - Montreal, Quebec

Video.summary: The gauntlet has been thrown- a past champion goes up against the current champ in a battle for the top in Minneapolis, MN at the Metrodome.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2009 season kicks off with exciting racing action from the HHH Metrodome on December 6, 2008.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Check out all the epic Monster Jam racing and freestyle action from Nissan Stadium on June 18, 2016.
Video.title: Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN

Video.summary: All the racing and freestyle action from Angel Stadium on February 8, 2020.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Blue returns to SnapDragon Stadium. Can Grave Digger’s Tyler Menninga extend his series points lead? Can Cynthia Gauthier pilot Lucas Stabilizer from a freestyle win in Round 1 into an Event Championship? Those questions and more are answered as Monster Jam returns to San Diego, California for Round 2.
Video.title: Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: We're going freestyle Monster Jamming cajun style at the Superdome in New Orleans.
Video.title: Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Freestyle

Video.summary: The superstars of Monster Jam invade Chase Field in the great American southwest of Phoenix, AZ with exciting racing action on January 27, 2007.
Video.title: Chase Field - Phoenix, AZ - Racing

Video.summary: The final event of Monster Jam's 25th season -back where it all began.
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: Monster Jam returns to Oracle Park in San Francisco as Bari Musawwir looks to lead Zombie to back-to-back event wins. Can Kayla Blood recover from electrical issues that plagued Solider Fortune’s Series debut? Will inconsistencies continue to drive the Anderson Brothers out of the top spot? It’s round 3, it’s Monster Jam Stadium Championship Series West.
Video.title: Oracle Park - San Francisco, CA

Video.summary: The Tampa fans get another day of excitement as the next round of the Monster Jam series continues.
Video.title: Amalie Arena - Tampa, FL - Part 2

Video.summary: Watch as our Monster Truck drivers look to make their mark in front of the sold-out crowd at Raymond James Stadium in Tampa, FL.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out the fun freestyle action from Orlando Citrus Bowl, on January 29, 2011.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series West closes out the series with three thrilling competitions from Rice-Eccles Stadium as Adam Anderson looks to lead Grave Digger to back-to-back event championships in Salt Lake City.
Video.title: Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT
Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT
Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes to Australia with racing and freestyle action at ANZ Stadium on October 19, 2013.
Video.title: ANZ Stadium - Sydney, Australia

Video.summary: From the Greensboro Coliseum on January 12, 2020, Monster Jam's 2020 season brings on the triple threat action!
Video.title: Greensboro Coliseum - Greensboro, NC

Video.summary: Grave Digger begins his third decade of domination during Monster Jam's first stop of the 2002 season in Minneapolis.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: It's night two at UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium - don't miss your favorite trucks and drivers, with all the racing, skills, and freestyle action.
Video.title: UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX

Image.alt: UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX
UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX
UTEP Sun Bowl Stadium - El Paso, TX

Video.summary: Don't miss the awesome freestyle action from the RCA Dome, on January 29, 2005.
Video.title: RCA Dome - Indianapolis, IN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Pontiac Silverdome hosts Monster Jam one last time before it gets destroyed with bombastic racing action on January 7, 2006.
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Racing

Video.summary: Check out the Monster Jam action at Golden 1 Credit Union Center in Sacramento, CA.
Video.title: Golden 1 Credit Union Center - Sacramento, CA

Image.alt: Golden 1 Credit Union Center - Sacramento, CA
Golden 1 Credit Union Center - Sacramento, CA
Golden 1 Credit Union Center - Sacramento, CA

Video.summary: World finals continues with the first day of freestyle!
Video.title: World Finals XVIII Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1

Image.alt: World Finals XVIII Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1
World Finals XVIII Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1
World Finals XVIII Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle 1

Video.summary: Enjoy this throwback compilation of the best of the Superman monster truck!
Video.title: Superman Throwback Highlights Compilation

Video.summary: Relive the excitement as Monster Jam drivers celebrate their 2025 Series Championship. Featuring emotional moments, fan appreciation, and highlights from the Arena Series East.
Video.title: 2025 Series Championship Highlights

Video.summary: Monster Jam's Arena in 30 makes it's next stop in Rosemont, IL with more racing and freestyle fun.
Video.title: Allstate Arena - Rosemont, IL

Video.summary: The Ford Center in Evansville transforms into a high-stakes battleground for the Freestyle Mania Championship Series. Six superstar drivers compete in a grueling gauntlet featuring the blistering speed of JCB Racing, the technical precision of the Two Wheel Skills Challenge, and a high-flying Freestyle finale. From the rookie flair of Kylie Kent in Sparkle Smash to the jaw-dropping stunts of Megalodon and Zombie, this "buck wild" event is a masterclass in raw horsepower and fearless competition.
Video.title: Ford Center - Evansville, IN

Video.summary: Monster Jam Replay arrives at the InTrustBank Arena in Wichita, Kansas, for a pivotal Round 8 of the Arena Championship Series West. The stakes are higher than ever as the top two drivers in the series—Blake Granger and Armando Castro—face off in a high-pressure JCB Racing matchup that could shift the season leaderboard. Fans are treated to the technical brilliance of the Two Wheel Skills Challenge, featuring daring combos and gravity-defying maneuvers from the likes of Matt Cody in Grave Digger and Tim Hall Jr. in Jurassic Attack. The evening reaches a fever pitch during the Freestyle segment, where "Daredevil Diva" Angelina Nock takes Megalodon to the skies and Cliff Turner hunts for a breakthrough performance in Velociraptor. Witness the passion and raw power as these elite athletes push their 12,000-pound machines to the absolute edge for the Wichita crowd.
Video.title: InTrustBank Arena - Wichita, KS

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes to Holland! The Gelredome, in Arnhem hosts as Team Marvel and Team Destruction go head to head.
Video.title: Gelredome - Arnhem, Holland

Video.summary: Monster Jam at the HHH Metrodome in Minneapolis, MN.
Video.title: HHH Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN

Video.summary: The Mercedes-Benz Superdome hosts Monster Jam as the 2012 tour visits New Orleans, LA.
Video.title: Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season at Georgia Dome in Atlanta, GA featuring Championship race and freestyle competitions.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA
